github.missingAction: Add GITHUB_TOKEN for GitHub API automation.

chatgpt.missingAction: ChatGPT account connection is manual; OpenAI API uses OPENAI_API_KEY.

playwright.missingAction: Install @playwright/test and run npx playwright install when ready.

supabase.missingAction: Add SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY or SUPABASE_ANON_KEY.

vault.missingAction: Create local Vault directories and engine if missing.
